extraction.one_line_summary: FRAILE Omar soloed to victory after going clear on the final climb, holding off late chasers COSTA Rui, ROLLAND Pierre, and KANGERT Tanel within final kilometer.
tactical_patterns: ROLLAND Pierre attacked with PINOT Thibaut on penultimate climb but lacked finishing speed, forced to attack early from chasing group.
COSTA Rui refused to collaborate with ROLLAND on final chase, tactically waiting despite smaller gap to FRAILE ahead.
FRAILE repeatedly crested climbs first throughout stage to accumulate KOM points, positioning himself in breakaway before final move.
VISCONTI Giovanni provided late acceleration in chase group but bridge attempt came too late within final 400 meters.

rider_signals.FRAILE Omar: positive: showed climbing consistency all day then tactical awareness to attack alone despite lacking sprint speed versus chasers
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: abandoned race mid-stage after appearing to suffer mechanical or physical issue
rider_signals.ROLLAND Pierre: neutral: strong enough to follow accelerations but lacked final speed, forcing premature long-range effort at flamme rouge
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: positive: tactically refused to share workload with ROLLAND, conserving energy but ultimately caught at line
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: initiated key attack on penultimate climb but unable to sustain advantage when pace normalized
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: retained 2:23 GC lead without needing to respond to attacks, team controlled chase effectively
